subject: [PATCH v7 10/15] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch adds support for read-write protection (RWP) to the userfaultfd interface in the Linux kernel. It introduces a new mode, UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP, which allows userspace to register for RWP faults and receive notifications when access is attempted on a protected page. The patch also updates the fault handling code to deliver RWP faults through the userfaultfd interface. This enables userspace to track and manage read-write protection on pages in memory. The changes are implemented across several kernel files, including mm/userfaultfd.c, include/linux/huge_mm.h, and include/uapi/linux/userfaultfd.h. The patch works with anonymous, shmem, and hugetlb memory types.
